thread.title: Agent Skills
thread.definitionDraft: Agent Skills是指将AI Agent执行特定复杂任务所需的知识、指令、工具引用和流程规范，封装为结构化、可复用单元的工程实践。其典型实现形式是如SKILL.md这样的配置文件，存储于项目知识库中，供Agent在需要时动态加载和执行。
thread.whyNow: 随着AI Agent从演示走向生产，其可靠性、可维护性和团队协作成为核心挑战。将隐性的操作知识显式化、模块化，是解决‘提示词地狱’、实现Agent规模化开发的关键一步。头部工具链（Claude Code, Codex CLI）已开始原生支持此范式。
thread.useBoundary: 本概念适用于需要构建专业、可靠AI助手的开发团队，特别关注代码辅助、自动化测试、文档生成等软件工程任务。不适用于一次性的、无需复用的简单提示交互。

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
sources.whyRelevant: Anthropic 工程团队对 Agent Skills 的官方定义文：Skills = 含指令/脚本/资源的有组织文件夹，agent 可按需动态发现并加载，做特定任务更专业。补强 official_definition 角色。
sources.evidenceQuote: organized folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that agents can discover and load dynamically to perform better at specific tasks
sources.text: Anthropic《Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills》(2025-10-16)。Skills=有组织文件夹(指令/脚本/资源)，agent 动态发现加载。Web-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: anthropics/skills — Public repository for Agent Skills
sources.whyRelevant: Agent Skills 官方公开仓库（SKILL.md 规范 + 示例 skills，从创意到测试到企业流程）。最硬的工程落地入口。补强 implementation_signal。
sources.reviewNotes: Verified via gh 2026-06-20: created 2025-09-22, 153k+ stars, owner anthropics. Real official repo.
sources.text: anthropics/skills 官方仓库(2025-09-22建,153k+星)。SKILL.md 规范+示例。gh-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: Don't Build Agents, Build Skills Instead — Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag, Anthropic
sources.whyRelevant: Agent Skills 两位创造者 Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag 在 AI Engineer Code Summit(2025-11) 的演讲。补 missing 的 transcript_context：讲清为什么“别堆 agent、改建 skill”、skill 如何用一个 markdown + 少量 frontmatter 封装领域专长。
sources.evidenceQuote: Don't build agents, build skills instead.
sources.reviewNotes: Title & speakers (Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag, Agent Skills creators) confirmed via web search 2026-06-20; AI Engineer Code Summit talk. Full transcript not directly fetched (YouTube returns 403 to crawler) — status kept usable, not verified.
sources.text: AI Engineer 演讲《Don't Build Agents, Build Skills Instead》— Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag(Anthropic, Skills 创造者)。为何改建 skill、一个 markdown+frontmatter 封装专长。Search-confirmed 2026-06-20，未抓全文。

sources.title: Anthropic’s Skills for Claude helps AI agents perform certain tasks better than before
sources.whyRelevant: Skills 发布的一线媒体信号(2025-10-16)：面向 Pro/Team/Max/Enterprise，让 agent 取用专门指令与资源把特定任务做得更好。
sources.evidenceQuote: Anthropic released Skills for Claude, a feature enabling AI agents to access specialized instructions and resources for performing specific tasks more effectively.
sources.text: SiliconANGLE(2025-10-16)：Anthropic 发布 Skills for Claude，agent 取用专门指令/资源。Web-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: Agent Skills: Anthropic’s Next Bid to Define AI Standards
sources.whyRelevant: 行业视角信号：把 Agent Skills 放在 Anthropic“定义 AI 标准”(继 MCP 之后)的脉络里看，解释开放格式与生态采纳意图。
sources.evidenceQuote: Agent Skills: Anthropic’s Next Bid to Define AI Standards
sources.reviewNotes: URL web-verified 2026-06-20 (HTTP 200, title confirmed; publish date not extracted) — status usable.
sources.text: The New Stack《Agent Skills: Anthropic’s Next Bid to Define AI Standards》。把 Skills 放进 Anthropic 定义标准(继 MCP)的脉络。Title web-verified 2026-06-20.

sources.title: Anthropic Launches Skills Open Standard for Claude
sources.whyRelevant: 信号：Skills 升级为开放标准、可创建/部署/分享/发现，并接入 Notion/Canva/Figma/Atlassian 等工作工具。
sources.evidenceQuote: Anthropic Launches Skills Open Standard for Claude
sources.reviewNotes: URL from web search 2026-06-20 (title indexed); not deep-fetched — status usable.
sources.text: AI Business《Anthropic Launches Skills Open Standard for Claude》。Skills 成开放标准，接入主流工作工具。Search-indexed 2026-06-20.

edges.evidenceNote: 技能文件结构是官方文档中关于Skills定义的一部分。
教程文档引用并解释了核心Skills文档。
两者都是与Skills不同但相关的、在API/框架层面封装Agent能力的标准化方法。
官方定义文描述的 SKILL.md 格式由官方仓库给出规范与示例实现，二者互证。
创造者演讲展开了官方定义文背后的动机（别堆 agent、改建 skill）。
发布新闻信号指向官方 skills 文档作为权威边界。
官方仓库的 SKILL.md 规范对应文档里的文件结构说明。

review.notes: First-pass Mimo pack after URL audit. Dead or placeholder URLs were removed; keep source_pack_review until human content audit passes.
